ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Horarum fallax Mors in certissima rerum.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Attamen Horarum cur tibi cura datur
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The book contains a series of engravings, each one with Latin comments. There is neither a title, or a printer. For the story of the collection of engraving, see Marco Charini, Filippo Napoletano. Guida alla mostra (2007).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
